finding: Mixed Lytic and Sclerotic Jaw Lesion
context: Vulnerability:  mandible > maxilla buccal > lingual cortex ◊  Chin + angle of mandible spared ← muscle insertions √  area of marked osteosclerosis √  loss of trabeculation in spongiosa √  cortical interruptions + fragmentation √  poorly marginated areas of soft-tissue attenuation + fluid collections + gas attenuation √  sequestration Cause:   caries, extractions, fracture, osteoradionecrosis √  cortical interruption √  sclerotic sequestra in low-attenuation zones √  periosteal new bone formation √  areas of gas attenuation
